description: Call GET /api/douyin/get-user-video-list/v3 for Douyin (TikTok China) User Published Videos through JustOneAPI with secUid.

operations.description: Get Douyin (TikTok China) user Published Videos data, including captions, covers, and publish times, for account monitoring.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The unique user ID (sec_uid) on Douyin.
parameters.name: secUid

parameters.description: Pagination cursor; use 0 for the first page, and the `max_cursor` from the previous response for subsequent pages.
parameters.name: maxCursor
